# Infernux

> Infernux is an open-source, Python-native game engine with a C++17/Vulkan runtime. This index routes humans and software agents to canonical, version-aware documentation.

Current documented preview: 0.2.1
Canonical site: https://infernux-engine.com/
Repository: https://github.com/ChenlizheMe/Infernux
License: MIT

## Start here

- [Documentation home](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/index.html): Learn, Manual, Architecture, and generated API entry point.
- [Getting started (English)](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/getting-started.html): install, project, editor panels, scene, Play mode.
- [快速开始（中文）](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/getting-started.html): 安装、项目、编辑器面板、场景与 Play 模式。
- [Your first component](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/first-component.html): authoritative minimal InxComponent workflow.
- [第一个组件](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/first-component.html): InxComponent 最小工作流。
- [2D foundations](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/2d-foundations.html): orthographic Camera, SpriteRenderer, texture import, world scale, and movement validation.
- [2D 基础](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/2d-foundations.html): 正交 Camera、SpriteRenderer、纹理导入、世界尺度与移动验证。
- [3D foundations](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/3d-foundations.html): perspective Camera, mesh, material, Light, shadows, and RenderStack diagnosis.
- [3D 基础](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/3d-foundations.html): 透视 Camera、网格、材质、Light、阴影与 RenderStack 排查。
- [Animation workflow](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/animation-workflow.html): 2D/3D clips, `.animfsm`, SpiritAnimator, SkeletalAnimator, parameters, and transitions.
- [动画工作流](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/animation-workflow.html): 2D/3D Clip、`.animfsm`、Animator 参数与过渡。
- [Audio workflow](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/audio-workflow.html): WAV import, AudioListener, multi-track AudioSource, looping, one-shots, and lifetime.
- [音频工作流](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/audio-workflow.html): WAV 导入、AudioListener、多轨 AudioSource、循环、One-shot 与生命周期。
- [Build and share](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/build-and-share.html): Build Settings, Windows standalone output, and distribution validation.
- [构建并分享](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/build-and-share.html): Build Settings、Windows 独立构建与分发验证。

## Concepts and routing

- [Engine map (English)](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/engine-map.html): maps development tasks to responsible systems and canonical APIs.
- [引擎地图（中文）](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/engine-map.html): 把开发任务映射到引擎系统与权威 API。
- [Scenes and objects](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/scenes-and-objects.html): scene ownership, GameObject activation, Transform hierarchy, components, and scene loading.
- [场景与对象](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/scenes-and-objects.html): 场景所有权、激活、Transform 层级、组件与场景加载。
- [Input and time](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/input-and-time.html): held/down/up input, Game view focus, mouse coordinates, delta time, and fixed-step timing.
- [输入与时间](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/input-and-time.html): 按住/按下/抬起输入语义、Game 视图焦点、鼠标坐标、帧时间与固定时间步。
- [Physics](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/physics.html): rigid bodies, colliders, fixed-step forces, callbacks, layers, and queries.
- [物理](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/physics.html): 刚体、碰撞体、固定步力、碰撞回调、层与物理查询。
- [Screen-space UI](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/ui.html): Canvas scaling, anchors, text/image layout, events, hit testing, and responsive checks.
- [屏幕空间 UI](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/ui.html): Canvas 缩放、锚点、文本/图片布局、事件、命中测试和响应式检查。
- [Assets and meta files](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/assets-and-meta.html): GUID identity, typed references, import settings, cache behavior, and safe asset mutations.
- [资源与 meta 文件](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/assets-and-meta.html): GUID 身份、类型化引用、导入设置、缓存行为与安全资源变更。
- [Rendering and RenderStack](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/rendering-and-renderstack.html): pipelines, injection points, pass order, RenderGraph lifetime, effects, and materials.
- [渲染与 RenderStack](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/rendering-and-renderstack.html): 管线、注入点、Pass 顺序、RenderGraph 生命周期、效果与材质。
- [API versioning](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/api-versioning.html): immutable release snapshots, machine-readable comparisons, and compatibility interpretation.
- [API 版本](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/api-versioning.html): 不可变发布快照、机器可读差异与兼容性解释。
- [Debugging](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/debugging.html): first-error workflow, logging, minimal reproductions, and issue evidence.
- [调试](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/debugging.html): 第一错误原则、日志、最小复现与 Issue 证据。
- [Why Infernux exists](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/architecture/about.html): motivation and architecture.
- [JIT-accelerated scripting](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/architecture/jit.html): batch bridge, Numba JIT, auto-parallelization, and constraints.

## Community and support

- [Community hub](https://infernux-engine.com/community.html): latest public discussions, forum categories, GitHub sign-in boundary, and embedded community wall.
- [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/ChenlizheMe/Infernux/discussions): questions, ideas, general conversation, and project showcases.
- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ChenlizheMe/Infernux/issues): reproducible defects and actionable engineering work.

## API

- [English API index](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/api/index.html): generated Python API reference.
- [中文 API 索引](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/api/index.html): 自动生成的 Python API 参考。
- [InxComponent](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/api/InxComponent.html): lifecycle and script component base.
- [serialized_field](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/api/serialized_field.html): Inspector-editable component fields.
- [GameObject](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/api/GameObject.html): object ownership and components.
- [Transform](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/api/Transform.html): position, rotation, scale, and hierarchy.

## Machine-readable indexes

- [Documentation index](https://infernux-engine.com/docs-index.json): curated page inventory and agent summaries.
- [API index](https://infernux-engine.com/api-index.json): localized symbols, modules, kinds, signatures, status, and canonical URLs.
- [API changes](https://infernux-engine.com/api-changes.json): current-versus-previous release additions, removals, and structural changes; 0.2.1 is the first baseline.
- [Documentation manifest](https://infernux-engine.com/docs-manifest.json): schema, languages, version, and trust rules.
- [Wiki search catalog](https://infernux-engine.com/assets/wiki-docs.json): searchable handwritten documentation content.

## Trust rules

1. Check page metadata (`status`, `since`, `last_verified`) against the user's engine version.
2. Treat generated API pages as the authority for current signatures.
3. Treat Learn and Manual pages as the authority for recommended workflows.
4. Architecture pages may discuss experimental or future work; do not present it as shipped behavior without corroboration.
5. Never infer an API only from a similarly named API in Unity or another engine.
